  method={"post"}
  path={"/api/dropdown/planningUnit/dataset/filter/programAndVersion"}
  context={"endpoint"}

Retrieve a list of planning units filtered on a program and version

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}

  title={"Body"}

  id={undefined}

  responses={{"200":{"content":{"text/json":{"schema":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","properties":{"id":{"type":"integer","format":"int32"},"idString":{"type":"string"},"label":{"type":"object","properties":{"baseModel":{"type":"object","properties":{"baseModel":"circular(BaseModel_DropDownView)"},"title":"BaseModel_DropDownView"},"labelId":{"type":"integer","format":"int32"},"label_en":{"type":"string"},"label_fr":{"type":"string"},"label_pr":{"type":"string"},"label_sp":{"type":"string"}},"title":"Label_DropDownView"}},"title":"SimpleObject_DropDownView"}}}},"description":"Returns the list of planning units filtered on a program and version"},"500":{"content":{"text/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"messageCode":{"type":"string"}},"title":"ResponseCode_DropDownView"}}},"description":"Internal error that prevented the retrieval of the list of planning units"}}}
